Biography
Dr. Vishnu Rajan is an Associate Professor in the Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering at Sahrdaya College of Engineering and Technology, Kerala, where he is dedicated to advancing teaching, technology, and innovation. He holds a PhD in Signal Processing and has strong interests in mobile technologies, embedded systems, and the applications of AI/ML in practical domains.
In addition to his academic role at Sahrdaya, he is the Founder of BitSky, an MSME recognized by the Government of India under Udyam. Through BitSky, he develops and publishes Android applications on the Google Play Store, with more than 15 published apps, including 11 under the BitSky brand. His expertise lies in Kotlin and Jetpack Compose, and he continues to innovate in Android development.
Dr. Rajan also contributes nationally as a Subject Matter Expert in Android App Development at Internshala and as a Google Certified Educator, delivering training programs and sessions across India. He has played a central role in organizing impactful events such as the Great Indian Hackathon (2024 & 2025), Google AI Campus Fest 2023, Google I/O Extended Thrissur 2022, and Android Campus Fest Thrissur 2022, which brought together industry leaders, Google Developer Experts, and students.

At Sahrdaya, he has been instrumental in hosting Faculty Development Programs (FDPs), symposiums, and workshops supported by AICTE, KTU, and KSCSTE. His efforts reflect a strong commitment to building a vibrant academic and developer community, while also strengthening Sahrdaya’s position as a hub for innovation and technology.
In his spare time, Dr. Rajan enjoys working on Android development with Jetpack Compose, staying curious about emerging technologies and their potential to shape the future.

Biography
I am from Nadathara, Thrissur. I completed my B.Tech in CE from NSSCE, Akathethara, Palakkad and M.Tech from GEC, Thrissur. After my B. Tech, I took up an apprenticeship in Vadavannur Panchayat for one year. I had the opportunity to serve the Kerala Government as an Assistant Engineer on a provisional appointment for six months. I had a deep passion for teaching, and I started my teaching career in 2013, and have been pursuing it with great fulfilment ever since.

Biography
Jibin Jose is a MedTech innovator, educator, and ecosystem builder who currently serves as the CEO of Sahrdaya Technology Business Incubator & Innovation Hub (TBII Hub) and the Nodal Officer of the Innovation and Entrepreneurship Development Center (IEDC) at Sahrdaya College of Engineering and Technology. He is also a faculty member in Biomedical Engineering, contributing to both academic excellence and practical, industry-linked learning.
A certified ISO 13485:2016 Lead Auditor, Jibin brings specialized expertise in medical device design, testing, regulatory compliance, and quality management systems. He mentors emerging startups and consults for MedTech companies, helping them navigate design strategy, product development, and regulatory pathways.
Jibin has played a key role in building several innovation-focused initiatives at Sahrdaya, fostering collaboration between academia, industry, hospitals, and government agencies. His contributions extend across research translation, consultancy, and securing funded projects that strengthen the region’s healthcare innovation ecosystem.
He holds multiple patents, including granted US and UK patents, and received the prestigious Gandhian Young Technological Innovation (GYTI) Award at Rashtrapati Bhavan, the official residence of the President of India. His mentorship has supported several innovators and wome

n-led research teams in translating healthcare technologies into impactful products.
Beyond campus initiatives, Jibin serves as a Mentor with the Kerala Development and Innovation Strategic Council (K-DISC) and contributes to statewide programs such as the Young Innovators Programme, the Kerala Medical Technology Consortium, and the Kerala Knowledge Economy Mission. He is also a member of the Startup Monitoring Committee and the Board of Studies at APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University, influencing curriculum, policy, and innovation frameworks across Kerala.
An alumnus of both Sahrdaya College of Engineering and Technology and IIT Madras, Jibin graduated from IITM with the Susrutha Academic Excellence Award. His professional development also includes training at Imperial College London and a Management Development Programme at IIM Kozhikode.
Driven by a commitment to advancing accessible and impactful healthcare technologies, Jibin continues to mentor startups, guide MedTech innovators, and build sustainable ecosystems that support innovation and entrepreneurship.

Biography
Dr. Joseph Jestin K. J. is an academic librarian and faculty member at Sahrdaya College of Engineering and Technology, Thrissur, Kerala, where he also plays an active role in various academic and administrative committees. He holds distinguished qualifications including Ph.D., MA, MLISc, MPhil, MBA, and has cleared the UGC-NET. A professional member of the Academic Library Association (ALA) India, Kerala Library Association (KLA), and ISTE, Dr. Jestin has authored and co-authored numerous national and international research papers on diverse topics such as the use of e-resources by engineering faculty, challenges for library professionals, and marketing of information services in Indian libraries, etc. Beyond his primary role as librarian, he is actively engaged in teaching, student services, departmental coordination, and quality initiatives, thereby making significant contributions to both library science and higher education administration. His wide-ranging expertise also extends to computer programming, accounting, management, and sociology. Recognized as a resource person in Library and Information Science, he is often consulted by various institutions for developing and strengthening their l

ibraries. Along with his outstanding academic credentials, his vast experience in many reputed institutions has further enriched his professional journey, cementing his reputation as a distinguished academic and library professional.

Biography
Dr. Vishnu Gopan K
Ph.D. (Electrical Engineering), M.Tech (Power Electronics), B.Tech (EEE)
Dr. Vishnu Gopan K is an accomplished academician and researcher with a Ph.D. in Electrical Engineering from CIT Coimbatore under the AICTE ADF Scheme. He holds an M.Tech in Power Electronics from GEC Thrissur and a B.Tech in Electrical and Electronics Engineering from Thejus Engineering College.
With over 4 years of teaching experience in reputed colleges and 4 years of professional training expertise in private institutions, Dr. Vishnu brings a strong blend of academic and industry-oriented knowledge to his students. He has published research articles in SCI-indexed journals, including the International Journal of Electronics and journals from Taylor & Francis Publications, contributing valuable insights to the field.
His teaching philosophy emphasizes comprehensive education, encouraging students not only to learn concepts but also to understand and apply them to real-world needs. With strong collaborations with industry professionals, he actively mentors students to develop the skills and adaptability required in today’s evolving te

chnological landscape.
Dr. Vishnu’s areas of interest include:
Control Systems, Power Quality, Power Electronic Converters, EV Chargers, MPPT.

Biography
I am Dr Jeethu Raveendran, an academician and biomedical professional dedicated to strengthening teaching, learning, and quality practices in Biomedical Engineering. My work focuses on integrating strong conceptual foundations with practical applications, ensuring that students receive clear, industry-relevant, and outcome-based learning. I take particular interest in clinical diagnostics, medical instrumentation, biosensors, and quality systems, and I continually update my teaching methods to align with current academic expectations, including KTU guidelines and GATE-level benchmarks.
Over the years, I have been actively involved in academic coordination, syllabus preparation, examination duties, and laboratory management. I take pride in maintaining accuracy, discipline, and responsibility in all academic processes. I also contribute to departmental activities such as training programs, workshops, and curriculum enhancement initiatives, supporting both student development and institutional growth.
I strongly believe in a student-centred approach and consistently encourage analytical thinking, clarity of understanding, and professional readiness among learners. Mentoring students and helping them achieve academic and career confidence is one of the most fulfilling aspects of my

role.
With a commitment to continuous improvement, integrity, and academic excellence, I strive to contribute meaningfully to the progress of the biomedical academic community.

Biography
Dr. Jensha Haennah is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering at Sahrdaya College of Engineering and Technology. She has been actively involved in teaching, research, and mentoring, with a strong focus on nurturing innovation and practical problem-solving skills among engineering students.
Dr. Jensha Haennah’s academic interests span areas including Image Processing, Machine Learning, Communication systems, signal processing, Semiconductor Technology and she has been instrumental in guiding students on projects that combine theoretical knowledge with real-world applications. Under her mentorship, several student teams have achieved recognition in competitions and innovation programs such as the K-DISC Young Innovators Programme (YIP).
In addition to her teaching and mentorship, Dr. Jensha Haennah has contributed to research and academic initiatives aimed at advancing engineering education and technology adoption. She is committed to fostering a collaborative learning environment, promoting interdisciplinary research, and encouraging students to pursue excellence in both academics and practica

l projects.
Beyond her academic responsibilities, Dr. Jensha Haennah actively engages with professional development initiatives, workshops, and conferences, emphasizing the integration of emerging technologies such as AI, IoT, and communication innovations into engineering curricula. Her dedication to academic excellence and student empowerment reflects her vision of shaping future-ready engineers equipped to meet the challenges of a rapidly evolving technological landscape.

Biography
Francis John V. is an accomplished educator and chemical engineering professional with a strong academic background and more than two decades of teaching experience. He completed his schooling at Don Bosco School, Mannuthy, and his Pre-Degree studies at St. Thomas College, Thrissur. He holds a B.Tech in Chemical Engineering from Government Engineering College, Thrissur, and a specialization in Polymer Technology from Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT).
He began his professional journey in industry with three years of hands-on experience at Apollo Tyres Pvt. Ltd., Kalamassery, where he gained valuable exposure to chemical and polymer process operations. Transitioning to academics, he has amassed around 21 years of teaching experience, including 16 years as Assistant Professor in the Department of Biotechnology at Sahrdaya College of Engineering & Technology, Kodakara, and five years as Guest Lecturer at Government Engineering College, Thrissur. He has also published two research articles in reputed UGC-listed journals with high impact factors.
During his tenure at Sahrdaya College of Engineering & Technology, he served in several key roles, including Head of the Department, Administrative Committee Convener and Member, Faculty Adviso

r to the Student Council, Project and Seminar Guide, and Coordinator for IDET Model Examinations for higher secondary students.
A dedicated teacher, he has handled a wide range of fundamental and core Chemical Engineering courses, contributing significantly to shaping the academic and professional development of engineering students. With rich industrial insights and extensive academic experience, he continues to uphold excellence in teaching and curriculum development, emphasizing practical relevance and strong conceptual foundations.

Biography
Assistant Professor in the Department of Biomedical Engineering, with professional experience spanning academic teaching, technical training, and clinical technology applications. He holds a Master’s degree in Biomedical Instrumentation from Karunya Institute of Science and  Technology and a Bachelor’s degree in Biomedical Engineering from Noorul Islam Center for Higher Education.
Started career as an Application Specialist in the medical technology domain (2015–2016) and subsequently transitioned into academia, serving as an Assistant Professor from 2016 onwards. His academic responsibilities have included teaching undergraduate courses, coordinating instructional activities, and leading departmental media initiatives and documentation processes
Institutional contributions include active involvement in multiple committees such as the General Committee, Magazine and Publication Committee, University Examination Cell, NSS/Social Service & Sports Committee, and the NBA Curriculum Draft Committee. He is also a Life Member of the Biomedical Engineering Society of India (BMESI), LM-1465
Demonstrated consistent academic performance outcomes, including achieving 100% pass results in courses on Biomaterials and Industrial Safety Engineering for the 2020–2024 batch
Participated in multiple n

ational-level faculty development programs, including AICTE-ATAL and NPTEL certifications
Research and publication profile includes work in image-based diagnosis, nanocomposite-based sensing, and digital health systems. Notable contributions include an IEEE-indexed publication titled “Detection of Anemia from Conjunctival Pallor and Nail Color using Image Processing” and project work on IoT-enabled portable and centralized e-health record systems. He has also received selection for a Faculty Research Seed Grant for developing nanocomposite-based sensors for sweat analysis
Served as a judge for business innovation events and has been involved in academic initiatives related to engineering education and assessment reforms. His areas of academic interest extend to assistive devices, engineering education methodologies, and psychology, aligning with his multidisciplinary engagement in biomedical engineering and pedagogy

Biography
I am an Assistant Professor at Sahrdaya College of Engineering and Technology and a Research Scholar at APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University, Kerala. My research focuses on developing advanced computational methods for plant disease severity estimation by integrating image-based analytics with environmental and weather-derived parameters. I work extensively in deep learning, computer vision, and data augmentation techniques to improve accuracy, robustness, and generalizability in agricultural disease prediction models.
My current work involves designing efficient, structure-aware augmentation strategies and multimodal models that combine visual features and climatic conditions to better understand disease progression in real-world field environments. My broader academic interests include AI-driven precision agriculture, pattern recognition, cloud-based model deployment, and scalable machine learning systems. I am committed to advancing sustainable, technology-enabled solutions that support early detection, monitoring, and management of plant diseases.

Biography
Anil Antony is an Assistant Professor (Senior Selection Grade) in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at Sahrdaya College of Engineering and Technology (Autonomous), Kerala, India.  He is an IEEE Senior Member and serves as the IEEE Student Branch Counselor at Sahrdaya, actively mentoring students and leading various technical and professional development initiatives.
Academic and professional role
He has extensive teaching experience in computer science, with interests spanning algorithms, data structures, programming in C, Python and Java, computer networks, logic design, and entrepreneurship.  He has published several articles in international journals and conferences, contributing to the broader academic community in his areas of interest.
Leadership and external engagements
Beyond his core teaching role, he contributes in multiple capacities including IEEE Sensor Council Kerala Section Academic Coordinator, evaluator for student innovation programmes, Wadhwani IGNITE trainer, MuLearn enabler, and facilitator for AI for workforce programmes.  He has also been recognised with the Best Mentor Award at the KDISC STRIDE event, reflecting his commitment to guiding student innovation and entrepreneurship.
Education and credentials
Anil Antony hold

s a Bachelor’s degree from Cochin University of Science and Technology and a postgraduate degree in Computer Engineering from Tamilnadu College of Engineering.  He is also pursuing a Doctor of Philosophy (PhD) at Christ University, Bengaluru, further strengthening his academic and research profile.
Certifications and interests
He is certified as an AWS Academy Educator, Intel certified trainer, Wadhwani IGNITE trainer, and has completed an industry-oriented MERN stack training programme with Techmindz, enabling him to integrate cloud, full-stack development, AI, and entrepreneurship-focused skill development into his teaching.  His professional philosophy centers on being an approachable mentor, fostering a positive learning environment, and continuously upskilling to guide students towards their full potential.

Biography
Dr. Drisya M is an accomplished academician and researcher in Civil Engineering with over 14 years of teaching and research experience, specializing in Transportation Engineering. She currently serves as the Associate Professor and Head of the Department of Civil Engineering at Sahrdaya College of Engineering and Technology, Thrissur.
She earned her Ph.D. in Civil Engineering (Transportation Engineering) from the National Institute of Technology Calicut in 2021, following a Master’s degree in Urban Engineering from Anna University, Chennai, and a Bachelor’s degree in Civil Engineering from Calicut University.
Her academic career includes teaching and research positions at renowned institutions such as the National Institute of Technology Calicut, Cambridge Institute of Technology Bangalore, and MVJ College of Engineering, Bangalore. She has also contributed to research projects in public transport optimization at Anna University, Chennai.
Dr. Drisya has published widely in reputed journals and conferences, including Travel Behaviour and Society (Elsevier), European Transport, and the Transportation Research Board (TRB) Annual Meetings in Washington, D.C. Her research primarily focuses on urban traffic flow, level of service analysis, and simulation-based studies for congestion management.
She has received notable recognitions, including the Best Paper Award at the 7th Conference

on Transportation Systems Engineering and Management (2020) and the Best Teacher Award (2013). She has also contributed to departmental growth, leading her team in achieving NBA Accreditation for the Civil Engineering program at Sahrdaya College of Engineering and Technology in 2022 and 2025.
Beyond academics, she actively engages in professional service as a reviewer for international journals and conferences, and holds professional memberships in ISTE and IEEE. She has also been a key organizer of workshops, training programs, and faculty development initiatives in emerging areas of Civil Engineering, GIS, Road Safety, and Sustainable Infrastructure.
Her innovative contributions extend to intellectual property, with a UK Design Patent (2023) granted for a Shallow Mounted Road Blocker.
With a strong passion for advancing research, teaching, and industry collaboration, Dr. Drisya continues to inspire and mentor the next generation of Civil Engineers while contributing to advancements in transportation systems and sustainable urban development.

Dr. Sreeraj R is a Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at Sahrdaya College of Engineering & Technology, Kerala, where he also serves as the Coordinator of the Center for Research and Development. With over 20 years of experience spanning academia, research, and the IT industry, he has established himself as a distinguished academic leader, researcher, and mentor specializing in emerging technologies.
Dr. Sreeraj holds a Ph.D. in Computer Science from Bharathiar University, Coimbatore, with research focused on Medical Image Processing. He also holds an M. Tech in Computer & Information Technology, an MCA, and a B.Sc in Computer Science with distinction.
He is a Senior Member of IEEE and currently serves as the Secretary of the IEEE Robotics and Automation Society (RAS), Kerala Chapter, contributing actively to professional advancement, student engagement, and research innovation within the IEEE ecosystem.
Dr. Sreeraj has previously held leadership roles including Professor and Head of Department, Director of Continuing Education, and IQAC Director at leading engineering institutions in Kerala and Tamil Nadu. He has also been extensively involved in NBA and NAAC accreditation processes and has served as an Academic Committee Member at g

overnment research bodies.
An accomplished researcher, Dr. Sreeraj has published in SCI-indexed journals and IEEE international conferences in areas such as Artificial Intelligence, Medical Imaging, Energy Forecasting, Blockchain Applications, and Smart Agriculture. He has been awarded a funded research grant of ₹2 Lakhs for a project on Quantum Computing for DNA Data Storage Optimization.
His teaching and training expertise includes Data Science, Machine Learning, Python Programming, Linux Administration, and Quantum Computing. He has delivered training programs at national and international levels and guided faculty development initiatives.
Dr. Sreeraj’s research interests include:
•	Data Science & Machine Learning
•	Quantum Computing
•	Medical Image Analysis
•	Deep Learning Applications
•	AI for Healthcare and Agriculture

Biography
Dr. Ramkumar Sreedharan Nair is an experienced academic leader with more than 25 years of experience in teaching, research, and academic administration. He is currently serving as the Principal of Sahrdaya College of Engineering & Technology (Autonomous). He completed his B.Tech in Electronics Engineering from NIT Calicut, followed by an M.Tech in Optoelectronics & Laser Technology and a Ph.D. in Semiconductor Thin Films for Solar Cell Applications from CUSAT. He has held several important academic and administrative positions in reputed institutions such as IIT Hyderabad (CfHE), Rajagiri School of Engineering & Technology, Muthoot Institute of Technology & Science, and NIT Calicut. His leadership focuses on academic excellence, innovation, research development, and industry-oriented education.

Biography
Dr. N. S. Jyothi was born on July 18, 1964, in Nattika village, Thrissur district, Kerala. He completed his primary education at Central Upper Primary School, Nattika, and his secondary education at Government High School Valappad, Thrissur, both in Malayalam medium. He pursued his Pre-Degree education at Sree Narayana College, Nattika, and earned his B.Tech degree from Government Engineering College, Thrissur. In November 1988, Dr. Jyothi joined Malnad College of Engineering, Hassan, as a Lecturer in the Department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering. He later obtained his postgraduate degree in Instrumentation and Control Engineering from REC Calicut (NIT Kozhikode) and his PhD in Electrical Engineering from Indian Institute of Science, Bangalore.
Dr. Jyothi has published 19 papers in international journals and conferences and has attended about 65 workshops, training programs, and conferences. He presented a paper at an IEEE International Conference in Shanghai, China. He is a life member of ISTE, a Fellow of the Institute of Engineers (India), and a Senior Member of IEEE. Throughout his career at Malnad College of

Engineering, Dr. Jyothi has held various positions, including TEQIP Procurement Coordinator from 2013 to 2017, TEQIP Coordinator from 2017 to 2021 and Head of the EEE Department from 2021 to 2024. He also worked as the Dean (Planning & Development) and Principal (In-charge).

Biography
I am an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science at Sahrdaya College of Engineering and Technology, Kalady, and a Research Scholar at APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University under the prestigious KTU Doctoral Fellowship. I hold an M.Tech in Computer Science and Information Systems with Distinction and a B.Tech in Computer Science with First Class.
With over a decade of diverse academic experience, I have served in multiple engineering institutions across Kerala. I have also contributed as a soft skills trainer, technical coordinator, examiner, invigilator, and resource person for workshops in Data Science and Artificial Intelligence.
My research interests span Human Action Recognition, Deep Learning, Algorithms, and Networking, supported by publications in international journals and conferences. I have also filed patents in IoT-based smart monitoring systems and AR-driven exergaming platforms.

Biography
Rehna Baby Joseph is an accomplished academician with over 13 years of teaching experience in India and abroad. She earned her B.Tech in Information Technology from Mahatma Gandhi University and her M.Tech from APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University. She is currently pursuing a Ph.D. at Karunya University, focusing on Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Data Science.With a strong research background, Rehna has authored around 15 research publications, holds 2 patents, and has published two books—Artificial Intelligence and Computer Organization and Architecture. Her dedication to advancing technology and education is reflected in her active participation in cutting-edge research and academic development.

Biography
Anugraha K R is a faculty member in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at Sahrdaya College of Engineering and Technology. She holds a B.Tech degree from NSS College of Engineering, Palakkad, and an M.Tech degree from Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Technology (RIT), Kottayam. She is GATE 2016 qualified and UGC NET (June 2024) qualified. Her areas of interest include Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Natural Language Processing.

Biography
I am Minnuja Shelly, currently working as an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering with over 9 years of academic experience. My teaching interests include Artificial Intelligence, Deep Learning, Data Science, Machine Learning, Image Processing, and core Computer Science subjects.
I am currently pursuing research in pancreatic cancer detection at Avinashilingam University, focusing on early-stage prediction and biomarker identification. I have been actively involved in guiding students in final-year projects and technical activities.
In addition to teaching, I handle several responsibilities within the department, including admission activities, website coordination, club supervision, and academic committee work. I am passionate about improving student engagement and integrating real-world applications into classroom learning.
My professional interests include AI in healthcare, data-driven decision systems, and technology-enabled service recommendations. I continue to work towards contributing meaningful research and improving academic quality through dedicated teaching and mentorship.

Biography
Dr. Basil Baby
Assistant Professor | Department of Applied Sciences & Humanities (Chemistry)
He has completed his PhD at Bharathiar University, Coimbatore, with a research focus on organometallic synthesis, nanomaterial synthesis, and characterization. He has over 14 years of teaching experience and has published 11 research papers in reputed international journals, including Scopus- and SCI-indexed journals. He also serves as a reviewer for Elsevier journals and is a NABL internal auditor. He is the author of the book Engineering Chemistry. His areas of expertise include nanomaterials, polymer composites, and their biomedical applications.

Biography
Obtained Bachelors  Degree in Electrical Engineering and Masters Degree in Instrumentation and Control Systems from National Institute of Technology Calicut in 1981 and 1983 respectively. Obtained Ph.D. in Control Systems from IIT Bombay in 1997. Joined as Faculty in the Electrical Engineering Department of  National Institute of Technology Calicut in 1983 and retired as Professor from its services in the year 2022. Served as Head of the Electrical Engineering Department at National Institute of Technology Calicut  from 2012 to 2014. Completed one year (2000-2001) Post Doctoral Research from Korea Advanced Institute of Science and Technology in 2001. Served as Faculty for one year in Ngee Ann Polytechnic, Singapore during 2002-2003. Now, serving as Professor in EEE Dept. at SCET Kodakara from 19-01-2026 onwards.

Biography
Dr. Asha S is an academician and researcher in the field of Computer Science and Engineering with a strong focus on Artificial Intelligence, Deep Learning, and Multimodal Data Analysis. She has contributed significantly to research in areas such as medical image analysis, deepfake detection, maritime surveillance using multi-sensor fusion, Vision Transformers, and multimodal emotion recognition.
Her published work includes a Springer journal article in Multimedia Tools and Applications on deep learning-based skin cancer diagnosis integrating interpretability and advanced techniques. She has also developed curated datasets, including MMDFD for deepfake detection, and has worked on innovative architectures combining SAR imagery and AIS data for real-time maritime monitoring.
In addition to her research contributions, Dr. Asha is actively involved in curriculum development, outcome-based education mapping, and mentoring undergraduate and postgraduate students. She organizes Faculty Development Programs, conferences, and academic initiatives to promote emerging technologies such as Applied AI and Data Science. She is also committed to pedagogical innovation, research mentorship, and advancing AI-driven solutions for real-world challenges.

Biography
Obtained Masters and and Doctoral degree in Biomedical Engineering. Around 20 years of teaching experience after 2 years of Industrial experience.  8 plus publications in International journals. 5 plus fundings including from KSUM.
Former Director of IQAC in Sahrdaya,  presently working Head of Department of Biomedical Engineering.  Expert memeber of K-Disc and mentor evaluator in prestigious YIP program of KSUM.
Translated Engineering books from English to Malayalam for AICTE. Recently acquired lead auditor certification in ISO 13485 standard for medical devices.
Areas of interest are Product design, Medical devise design, Design Thinking, Wearable devices, IoT etc.

Biography
Ms. Maria Rose K J is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering at Sahrdaya College of Engineering & Technology (Autonomous), Kodakara. She has been serving the institution since April 2022, contributing actively to academic excellence and student development.
With an M.Tech in Power Electronics from APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University and a B.Tech in Electrical and Electronics Engineering from Mahatma Gandhi University, Maria Rose has built a strong foundation in modern electrical engineering domains. Academic interests span power electronics, renewable energy systems, electric vehicles, smart grids, and multi-level inverter architectures.
Research contributions include publications in reputed international journals, including SCOPUS-indexed works on multi-level inverter systems and advanced power electronic topologies. These works reflect a growing engagement with emerging technologies in energy engineering.
Maria Rose actively pursues professional development and has participated in several FDPs related to vehicle electrification, smart grids, renewable energy education, power electronics, and electric vehicle system design. These programs strengthen both technical capability and pedagogical perspective.
In a

ddition to guiding innovative student projects, Maria Rose contributes to academic processes as an external examiner for KTU laboratory courses. A strong interest in engineering management also shapes the teaching approach, integrating systems thinking, project planning, and professional ethics to prepare students for industry expectations.
Areas of interest include:
Power Electronics & Multi-Level Converters
Renewable Energy & Smart Grid Technologies
Electric Vehicle Systems
Engineering Management & Professional Skill Development
Dedicated and student-focused, Ms. Maria Rose K J continues to play a meaningful role in shaping competent, ethical, and industry-ready electrical engineering graduates.
